Hmm, this is tricky. Let me think about what configurations are possible:

for n in seg['nodes']:

        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Sky blue: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
